title: Doc2CV – Document to CV Converter
description: Upload up to 10 document files (PDF or images) to automatically generate a ready-to-download CV. Supports diplomas, transcripts, ID cards, certificates, and profile photos.

files.title: Document Files (URLs)
files.description: Provide public URLs of your document files. Supported formats: PDF, JPG, PNG. Maximum 10 files per run. Each file will be processed individually — PDFs are split into per-page images before OCR.

items.title: File URL
items.description: A publicly accessible URL to a PDF or image file.

language.title: Document Language
language.description: Primary language of the documents. Used to configure the Tesseract OCR engine. Choose 'ind' for Indonesian documents (default) or 'eng' for English-language documents.

useProfileTransformer.title: Enable Profile Transformer (AI Summary)
useProfileTransformer.description: When enabled, Doc2CV calls the stech-api Cloudflare Worker which uses Cloudflare Workers AI (Llama 3.3 70B) to read all extracted data and write a concise professional profile paragraph for the 'Profile' section of the CV.

timeout.title: Timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: Maximum wait time in seconds for each request to the Profile Transformer API.
